subcodes.first_line: My tongue hath testified unto Mine Own Self, and Mine Own Self hath borne witness unto My Temple - and this is a testimony which, were God to unveil it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد لسانی لنفسی و شهدت نفسی لهیکلی و هذه شهاده لو بکشفها الله
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
